title: GAIA – Open-source framework for building AI agents that run on local hardware
content: Welcome - GAIA SDK Skip to main content GAIA SDK home page Search... ⌘ K Search... Navigation Getting Started Welcome Documentation Python Specifications Python Reference Python Deployment Roadmap Releases GitHub Discord PyPI Getting Started Welcome C++ Framework Setup Quickstart Overview Integration Guide Testing API Reference C++ Security User Guides Python Framework Setup Quickstart Install GAIA Agent UI User Guides Playbooks SDK Reference On this page Build AI Agents That Run Locally Get Started Capabilities Resources ​ Build AI Agents That Run Locally GAIA is an open-source framework for building AI agents in Python and C++ that run entirely on local hardware. Agents reason, call tools, search documents, and take action — with no cloud dependency and no data leaving the device. Local Inference All processing stays on-device No Cloud Dependency No API keys or external services required Python & C++ Full SDK in both languages AMD Optimized NPU and GPU acceleration on Ryzen AI Python C++ from gaia.agents.base.agent import Agent agent = Agent() response = agent.process_query( "Summarize my meeting notes" ) #include <gaia/agent.h> gaia ::Agent agent; auto result = agent . processQuery ( "Summarize my meeting notes" ); ​ Get Started Agent UI Install via npm and run AI agents locally — two commands to get started. Python Quick Start Install GAIA, start Lemonade Server, and run your first agent. C++ Quickstart Build a native C++17 agent binary — no Python runtime required. ​ Capabilities Python C++ Agent UI Privacy-first desktop chat with drag-and-drop document Q&A. Install via npm or gaia --ui . Document Q&A (RAG) Retrieve, index, and answer questions over local PDFs, code, and text files. Speech-to-Speech Whisper ASR and Kokoro TTS — offline voice interaction pipeline. Code Generation Multi-file code generation with validation, testing, and orchestration. Image Generation Multi-modal image generation with LLM prompt enhancement. MCP Integration Connect agents to external tools via Model Context Protocol. Agent Routing Intelligent request routing across multiple specialized agents. System Health Agent MCP-powered diagnostics — CPU, memory, disk, network, and GPU monitoring. Wi-Fi Troubleshooter Diagnose and resolve wireless connectivity issues with registered tools. Custom Agents Build your own C++17 agent with tool registration and state management. MCP Integration Connect to MCP servers for extensible tool access. ​ Resources SDK Reference Complete API documentation GitHub View source code Component Specs Technical specifications Glossary Technical terms explained Discord Join community Was this page helpful? Yes No Setup ⌘ I
title_zh: GAIA——在本地硬件上运行AI智能体的开源框架
summary_zh: GAIA是一个开源的AI代理开发框架，支持使用Python和C++构建完全在本地硬件上运行的AI代理。该框架的核心特点是所有处理均在设备端完成，无需依赖云端服务或API密钥，确保数据不会离开设备，提供了高度的隐私和安全性。，GAIA框架具备多项关键能力。在文档问答（RAG）方面，它可以对本地PDF、代码和文本文件进行检索、索引和问答。语音交互功能集成了Whisper自动语音识别和Kokoro文本转语音技术，实现了离线的语音交互流程。在代码生成上，它支持带验证、测试和编排的多文件代码生成。图像生成能力则结合了多模态生成与LLM提示增强。框架还集成了Model Context Protocol（MCP），允许代理连接到外部工具以扩展功能。其智能代理路由系统可以将请求分发给多个专用代理。系统健康代理功能通过MCP提供CPU、内存、磁盘、网络和GPU的监控诊断。此外，还包含一个用于诊断和解决无线连接问题的Wi-Fi故障排查工具。，对于开发者，GAIA提供了便捷的入门方式。用户可以通过npm安装并运行一个隐私优先的桌面聊天界面（Agent UI），支持拖拽文档进行问答。Python开发者可以通过安装GAIA、启动Lemonade服务器来快速运行首个代理。C++开发者则可以构建原生的C++17代理二进制文件，无需Python运行时环境。框架针对AMD硬件进行了优化，支持Ryzen AI的NPU和GPU加速。，该项目在GitHub上开源，提供了完整的API文档、技术规格说明和社区Discord支持，为开发本地化、高性能且保护隐私的AI代理应用提供了一个全面的工具集。

title: Can Claude Fly a Plane?
content: Can Claude Fly a Plane? I asked Claude to look up the X-Plane 12 API and try to fly a Cessna from Hainan to somewhere nearby. It kept a pilot's log. Everything below is Claude's own notes from during the flight. I occasionally had to remind it to keep the pilot log running, and had to tell it when it crashed as xplane would quickly restart to the runway. The main issue seemed to be delay from what it saw with screenshots and api data and changing course. It quickly made itself a python script to take off, then would add functions to the script as it needed to take action. It would position to land then not change angle quick enough and crash into the ground. I am interested to see how claude thinks about its own abilities and if it can reason about realtime events and how to pay attention to things. It isnt to make code that can do a good job at flying a plane. Does claude think in advanced about the fact it will be out of sync, how would it prepare and develop code with that in mind? How does it reason about its own ability? Interestingly it decided to write code to take off before even thinking about how to steer or land. It then came up with instructions to land, sent them to xplane, then took its hands of the wheel for a while, retuning to a crash. I figure this is some kind of AGI benchmark for models thinking ahead and planning what tools to develop and how to use them before take off . 15:54 Lined up on RWY 09 at Haikou Meilan (ZJHK). Cessna 172, throttle idle, parking brake set. POS 19.93N 110.44E, ALT 73 ft MSL, HDG 092. Destination: Qionghai Bo'ao (ZJQH), ~47 nm south. Plan: full power, rotate ~55 kt, climb at Vy 75 kt to 4500 ft, turn south to 180, cruise, descend, attempt landing on RWY 18. 15:57 AIRBORNE. Cleanly off the runway after a ~12-second ground roll. Rotated at 55 kt, climbing at +861 fpm, 70 kt IAS, 11.4 nose up, wings level, 411 ft AGL. Heading drifted 80-92 on the takeoff roll (left yaw on power application, typical 172) but the rudder loop pulled it back. Pitch is a bit steep, speed sagging below target Vy. Going to hand off to hold_loop and trade some pitch for airspeed. 15:59 UPSET. Handed off to hold_loop right after rotation and the controller decided 861 fpm was too much climb for its 700 fpm target. Commanded full forward elevator. We pitched over hard, hit 125 kt IAS, rolled to 60 LEFT bank, heading swung from 092 to 229 before the loop dragged it back. Currently 75 kt, +5 roll, hdg 100, climbing 143 fpm at full throttle, 415 ft MSL. Recovered but rattled. Root cause: elevator gain too high with no rate damping, AND I let the controller command nose-DOWN when we were 4000 ft below target altitude. 16:00 CRASHED. Nose-first off the end of the upset. Position reset back to runway 09. Rewriting hold_loop with slew-rate limits, asymmetric VS targets (no nose-down when far below target), smooth handoff from takeoff state, and a low-altitude failsafe. Then we try again. 16:09 STABLE FLIGHT, third attempt. Rewrote contro
summary_zh: 新闻标题：Claude能驾驶飞机吗？ ，一位用户要求Claude通过X-Plane 12 API尝试驾驶塞斯纳飞机从海南飞往附近目的地，并记录飞行日志。Claude在过程中自主编写Python脚本控制起飞，并逐步添加功能以应对飞行任务。然而，由于从截图和API数据获取的延迟以及航向调整问题，Claude在着陆时未能及时调整角度，多次导致坠机。实验重点关注Claude对自身能力的认知、对实时事件的推理能力以及注意力分配机制，而非单纯编写飞行代码。 ，Claude在飞行中展现了自主规划能力：它优先编写起飞代码，随后才考虑转向和着陆策略。但在实际操作中，Claude发出着陆指令后未持续监控状态，最终因响应延迟而坠毁。这引发了关于AI模型前瞻性思考的讨论——Claude是否会预先考虑数据同步问题，并据此开发代码？实验者认为，这或许可作为衡量AI模型（如AGI）提前规划、工具开发及使用能力的基准。 ，飞行日志片段显示：Claude于15:54在海口美兰机场09跑道准备起飞，计划爬升至4500英尺后转向南飞行。起飞初期基本成功，但随后因控制循环参数问题（如升降舵增益过高、缺乏速率阻尼）导致姿态失控，最终在16:00坠毁。Claude在坠毁后自主重写控制代码，加入速率限制、非对称垂直速度目标等功能，并于第三次尝试实现稳定飞行。 ，实验揭示了大型语言模型（如Claude）在实时控制任务中的局限性：尽管能主动编写工具脚本，但在动态环境中协调感知、决策与行动仍面临挑战。其代码开发过程呈现“分步解决”特征，但缺乏对系统延迟和异常状态的持续监控能力。这一测试为评估AI的实时推理、自我认知及适应性提供了具体案例。

title: The AI revolution in math has arrived
content: The AI Revolution in Math Has Arrived | Quanta Magazine Home The AI Revolution in Math Has Arrived Comment Save Article Read Later Share Facebook Copied! Copy link Email Pocket Reddit Ycombinator Comment Comments Save Article Read Later Read Later foundations of mathematics The AI Revolution in Math Has Arrived By Konstantin Kakaes April 13, 2026 AI is being used to prove new results at a rapid pace. Mathematicians think this is just the beginning. Comment Save Article Read Later Nash Weerasekera for Quanta Magazine Introduction By Konstantin Kakaes Contributing Writer April 13, 2026 View PDF/Print Mode algebra algebraic geometry artificial intelligence combinatorics computer science foundations of mathematics machine learning mathematics proofs All topics T he tipping point came in the summer of 2025. That July, several artificial intelligence models solved five out of six problems at the International Mathematical Olympiad, an annual challenge for some of the world’s best high school students. But while mathematicians were shocked — few had expected the programs to get that good that quickly — the impressive results didn’t necessarily mean that AI would make important strides in research math. After all, Olympiad problems are challenging puzzles with known answers, not open questions. Nevertheless, the results made people pay attention. Mathematicians who had dismissed AI models as too error-prone to be useful started playing around with them. Those early adopters found, to their surprise, not only that the models were good at puzzles, but that they could help break genuinely new ground. Soon, mathematicians were using AI to discover and prove new results, accomplishing in a day what would have once taken them weeks or months. “2025 was the year when AI really started being useful for many different tasks,” said Terence Tao , a prominent mathematician at the University of California, Los Angeles. While no single new result is a world-beating breakthrough, some of them are on par with discoveries published in professional mathematical journals. In some cases, algorithms formulate a conjecture, prove it, and verify the proof with minimal human intervention. In others, extensive chats with large language models such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini lead to novel proof strategies. “This guy’s got a shovel. This guy’s got a pickax. Together we can bore a tunnel,” Tao said. There’s “a lot of throwing things at the wall to see what sticks.” Though Tao is perhaps the most prominent exponent of AI’s utility in mathematics, others agree. Even by solving easy problems, said Daniel Litt of the University of Toronto, AI “is changing how mathematics is done.” Soon, “it will look and feel altogether different from the way mathematics was traditionally done,” Tao said. Where before mathematicians studied one problem at a time, “with these tools you can solve thousands of problems at once and start doing statistical studies.” Though nobody I spoke with thinks AI w
title_zh: 数学领域的AI革命已经到来
summary_zh: 人工智能在数学领域的革命已经到来。2025年夏季成为一个转折点，当时多个AI模型在国际数学奥林匹克竞赛中解决了六道题中的五道，这一表现震惊了数学界。尽管奥赛题目是已知答案的难题，而非开放性问题，但这一成果促使许多原本对AI持怀疑态度的数学家开始尝试使用这些工具。，早期使用者惊讶地发现，AI模型不仅擅长解谜题，还能帮助开辟真正的新领域。数学家们开始利用AI发现并证明新的结果，以往需要数周或数月完成的工作，现在可能一天内就能实现。加州大学洛杉矶分校的著名数学家陶哲轩指出，2025年是AI开始在多种任务中真正变得有用的一年。，目前，虽然尚未出现颠覆性的重大突破，但一些由AI辅助得出的成果已达到专业数学期刊的发表水平。在某些情况下，算法能够以最少的人力干预提出猜想、完成证明并验证过程。而在另一些案例中，通过与ChatGPT、Claude或Gemini等大型语言模型（LLM）进行广泛对话，数学家们获得了新颖的证明思路。，陶哲轩将这种合作比喻为“一个人拿铲子，一个人拿镐，共同挖掘隧道”，并形容当前是“大量尝试，观察哪些方法有效”的阶段。多伦多大学的丹尼尔·利特也认为，即使只是解决简单问题，AI也正在改变数学的研究方式。，展望未来，陶哲轩预测数学工作的面貌将与传统方式全然不同。过去数学家一次专注于一个问题，而借助这些工具，研究者可以同时处理成千上万个问题并进行统计分析。尽管受访者均不认为AI将完全取代人类数学家，但共识是：AI正在迅速成为数学研究中不可或缺的协作伙伴，推动该学科进入一个前所未有的高效探索时代。

title: Claude Code may be burning your limits with invisible tokens
content: Claude Code may be burning your limits with invisible tokens - Efficienist Skip to content Claude Code users have been complaining for weeks that their usage limits are disappearing faster than they should. Even on the Max 20x plan at $200 per month, users report hitting their quota within hours of active sessions, sometimes in as little as 90 minutes. The complaints have been widespread enough that Anthropic acknowledged them, noting that users were hitting usage limits in Claude Code faster than expected. No clear explanation followed. Limits are shared across all Claude interfaces, so running Claude Code alongside regular chat accelerates the burn. Heavy sessions on large repositories compound it further. But the math still didn’t add up for a lot of users, and the community started digging. One developer set up an HTTP proxy to capture full API requests across multiple Claude Code versions and found something that would explain the gap. Starting with v2.1.100, every request appears to carry around 20,000 extra tokens that the user never sent. The numbers came from the same project and the same prompt across versions. v2.1.98 billed 49,726 tokens. v2.1.100 billed 69,922. The v2.1.100 request was actually smaller in bytes sent from the client, which rules out the user side as the source. The inflation is server-side. It doesn’t show up in the CLI’s /context view or anywhere users can audit it. Nothing in Anthropic’s changelogs explains it. This hasn’t been independently verified at scale, and Anthropic hasn’t commented on it. Multiple users have since reported the same delta after running their own proxy tests, and the finding has circulated widely on X and Reddit. CLAUDE CODE MAX BURNS YOUR LIMITS 40% FASTER AND NO ONE TOLD YOU WHY this guy set up an HTTP proxy to capture full API requests across 4 different Claude Code versions. here's what he found: Claude Code v2.1.100 silently adds ~20,000 invisible tokens to every single request.… pic.twitter.com/NDtAM8Y0zv — Om Patel (@om_patel5) April 13, 2026 Community speculation points to expanded session memory features introduced in v2.1.100, such as summary injection or additional tool schemas. Whether intentional or a bug, the effect is the same. Those extra tokens don’t just affect billing. They enter the model’s actual context window, diluting custom instructions set in CLAUDE.md and degrading output quality faster in long sessions. When Claude starts ignoring project rules, there’s currently no way to tell if injected context is the cause. The workaround circulating on X and Reddit is downgrading to v2.1.98 via npx claude-code@2.1.98 . The token inflation finding landed on top of an already frustrating month for Claude Code users. On April 4, Anthropic removed the ability to use Claude subscription limits for third-party tools . OpenClaw, an open-source autonomous AI agent that many users run on top of their Claude subscription, was among the tools affected. Usage through those tools now draws
title_zh: Claude Code可能正通过隐形令牌消耗您的额度
summary_zh: Claude Code用户数周来持续抱怨其使用额度消耗速度异常加快。即便是每月200美元的Max 20x套餐用户，也报告称在活跃会话开始后数小时（有时甚至仅90分钟）内就耗尽了配额。由于投诉广泛，Anthropic已承认用户遇到Claude Code使用额度消耗快于预期的情况，但未给出明确解释。，用户发现，尽管所有Claude界面的额度共享，且处理大型代码库会加剧消耗，但实际消耗速度仍远超预估。一位开发者通过设置HTTP代理捕获多个Claude Code版本的完整API请求后，发现了关键问题：从v2.1.100版本开始，每个请求都会携带约2万个用户未曾发送的额外“隐形令牌”。测试数据显示，相同项目和提示下，v2.1.98版本计费49,726个令牌，而v2.1.100版本计费69,922个令牌。由于客户端发送的字节数实际更少，证明令牌膨胀源于服务器端，且这些额外令牌不会在CLI的/context视图或任何用户可审计界面显示。Anthropic的更新日志中也未提及此变更。，该发现尚未被大规模独立验证，Anthropic也未置评，但多名用户通过自行代理测试确认了相同差异，相关讨论已在X和Reddit平台广泛传播。社区推测这可能与v2.1.100版本引入的扩展会话记忆功能（如摘要注入或额外工具架构）有关。无论是否出于故意，其后果一致：额外令牌不仅影响计费，还会占用模型的实际上下文窗口，稀释用户在CLAUDE.md中设置的自定义指令，导致长会话输出质量更快下降。当Claude开始忽略项目规则时，用户目前无法判断是否由注入的上下文导致。，当前在社区流传的解决方案是通过npx claude-code@2.1.98降级至v2.1.98版本。此次令牌膨胀问题加剧了Claude Code用户本已沮丧的体验——4月4日，Anthropic刚取消了将Claude订阅额度用于第三方工具的功能，影响了包括开源自主AI代理OpenClaw在内的多种工具，相关使用现在将单独计费。

title: Microsoft exec suggests AI agents will need to buy licenses, just like employees
content: Microsoft Exec Suggests AI Agents Will Need to Buy Software Licenses - Business Insider AI Microsoft exec suggests AI agents will need to buy software licenses, just like employees By Alistair Barr You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email. Follow Alistair Barr Every time Alistair publishes a story, you’ll get an alert straight to your inbox! Enter your email Sign up By clicking “Sign up”, you agree to receive emails from Business Insider. In addition, you accept Insider’s Terms of Service and Privacy Policy . Author of the Tech Memo newsletter Microsoft exec Rajesh Jha Bloomberg/Getty Images 2026-04-10T22:05:21.621Z Share Copy link Email Facebook WhatsApp X LinkedIn Bluesky Threads lighning bolt icon An icon in the shape of a lightning bolt. Impact Link Save Saved Read in app This story is available exclusively to Business Insider subscribers. Become an Insider and start reading now. Have an account? Log in . A version of this story originally appeared in the BI Tech Memo newsletter. Sign up for the weekly BI Tech Memo newsletter here . AI-generated summary Summaries are generated by an AI model trained on Business Insider's articles. AI may make mistakes or provide inaccurate/incomplete information. We're unable to load that answer right now. Please try again. What is SaaS pricing? What are "seat opportunities" in SaaS? What are open platforms in software? How might AI agents impact software jobs? How do AI agents affect enterprise software? Ashley Stewart 's scoops are always worth reading. This week, she published a sharp piece on the AI threat to software, and how Microsoft, Salesforce , and others are responding. Loading audio narration... Buried in the story was a deceptively simple question: does your AI agent count as an employee? At a recent conference, Microsoft executive Rajesh Jha floated a provocative idea. In a future where companies deploy fleets of AI agents , those agents may need their own identities — logins, inboxes, and even seats inside software systems. If so, AI wouldn't shrink software revenue. It could expand it. "All of those embodied agents are seat opportunities," Jha said, envisioning organizations with more agents than humans — each effectively a user that must pay for a software license, or "seat" in industry lingo. That's a radical twist in the SaaS pricing debate rattling companies like Microsoft, Salesforce, and Workday. Investors worry AI could hollow out seat-based pricing , the backbone of enterprise software. If one human can manage dozens of agents, why pay for dozens of licenses? Jha's answer: because those agents are the new users. A company with 20 employees might buy 20 Microsoft 365 licenses today. If each employee gets five AI agents, and the workforce shrinks to 10 people, that could still mean 50 paid seats. Not everyone buys it. Nenad Milicevic, a partner at AlixPartners , sees the opposite. AI agents will reduce the number of humans interacti
title_zh: 微软高管提议AI智能体应像员工一样购买许可证
summary_zh: 微软高管提出AI代理或将需要购买软件许可证，类似企业员工。在近期一次会议上，微软执行副总裁拉杰什·贾提出了一个前瞻性观点：随着企业未来大规模部署AI代理，这些AI代理可能需要独立的身份标识，包括登录账号、收件箱以及在软件系统中的“席位”。这意味着AI代理可能被视为软件的新用户，需要为其购买许可证，即行业术语中的“席位”。，这一设想直接回应了当前企业软件行业面临的SaaS定价模式挑战。以微软、Salesforce和Workday为代表的公司长期依赖基于用户数量的“席位”定价模式。投资者担忧AI技术可能削弱该模式，因为一名员工可以管理多个AI代理，从而减少企业所需的总许可证数量。但贾认为，AI代理本身将成为新的“席位”机会：即使企业员工数量减少，每个员工配备的多个AI代理仍将产生相应的许可证需求。例如，一家公司现有20名员工购买20个Microsoft 365许可证；若未来员工减至10人，但每人配备5个AI代理，则仍需支付50个许可证费用。，然而，并非所有行业专家认同此观点。AlixPartners合伙人内纳德·米利切维奇认为，AI代理将减少人机交互需求，从而降低软件许可证总数。这一分歧凸显了AI技术对软件商业模式的核心冲击：企业需重新定义“用户”边界，软件供应商则需探索适应AI时代的定价策略。，当前，微软等公司正积极布局AI代理生态，其表态也反映了行业对AI商业化路径的探索。若AI代理需独立许可证，企业软件市场规模可能不减反增，但具体实施仍面临技术集成、成本核算和伦理规范等多重挑战。

title: Show HN: Mcptube – Karpathy's LLM Wiki idea applied to YouTube videos
content:
GitHub - 0xchamin/mcptube · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert 0xchamin / mcptube Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 4 Star 60 vision Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 16 Commits 16 Commits docs docs src/ mcptube src/ mcptube tests tests .gitignore .gitignore README.md README.md pyproject.toml pyproject.toml View all files Repository files navigation 🎬 mcptube-vision YouTube video knowledge engine — transcripts, vision, and persistent wiki. mcptube-vision transforms YouTube videos into a persistent, structured knowledge base using both transcripts and visual frame analysis. Built on the Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern: knowledge compounds with every video you add. Evolved from mcptube v0.1 — mcptube-vision replaces semantic chunk search with a persistent wiki that gets smarter with every video ingested. 🧠 How It Works Traditional video tools re-discover knowledge from scratch on every query. mcptube-vision is different: mcptube v0.1 mcptube-vision ┌─────────────────────┐ ┌─────────────────────────┐ │ Query → vector search│ │ Video ingested → LLM │ │ → raw chunks → LLM │ │ extracts knowledge → │ │ → answer (from scratch│ │ wiki pages created → │ │ every time) │ │ cross-references built │ └─────────────────────┘ │ │ │ Query → FTS5 + agent │ │ → reasons over compiled │ │ knowledge → answer │ └─────────────────────────┘ v0.1 (Video Search Engine) vision (Video Knowledge Engine) On ingest Chunk transcript, embed in vector DB LLM watches + reads, writes wiki pages On query Find similar chunks Agent reasons over compiled knowledge Frames Timestamp or keyword extraction Scene-change detection + vision model Cross-video Re-search all chunks each time Connections already in the wiki Over time Library of isolated videos Compounding knowledge base 🏗️ Technical Architecture mcptube-vision is built around a core insight: video knowledge should compound, not be re-discovered . Every architectural decision flows from this principle. System Overview flowchart TD YT[YouTube URL] --> EXT[YouTubeExtractor
transcript + metadata] EXT --> FRAMES[SceneFrameExtractor
ffmpeg scene-change detection] FRAMES --> VISION[VisionDescriber
LLM vision model] VISION --> WIKI_EXT[WikiExtractor
LLM knowledge extraction] EXT --> WIKI_EXT WIKI_EXT --> WIKI_ENG[WikiEngine
merge + update] WIKI_ENG --> FILE[FileWikiRepository
JSON pages on disk] WIKI_ENG --> FTS[SQLite FTS5
search index] FILE --> AGENT[Ask Agent
FTS5 → LLM reasoning] FTS --> AGENT FILE --> CLI[CLI / MCP Server] FTS --> CLI subgraph Ingestion Pipeline EXT FRAMES VISION WIKI_EXT end subgraph Knowledge Store WIKI_ENG FILE FTS end subgraph Retrieval A
title_zh: Show HN：Mcptube——将Karpathy的LLM维基理念应用于YouTube视频
summary_zh: Mcptube是一个将YouTube视频转化为结构化知识库的开源项目，其最新版本mcptube-vision在原有基础上引入了视觉分析和持久化Wiki功能。该项目灵感来源于Karpathy提出的LLM Wiki概念，核心目标是让视频知识能够持续积累和复合增长，而非每次查询都需重新发现。，传统视频工具通常依赖向量搜索和语义分块，每次查询都需从原始片段中重新提取信息。mcptube-vision则构建了一个持久化的知识库：当视频被摄入时，系统不仅会提取文字转录稿，还会通过ffmpeg进行场景变化检测，并利用视觉模型分析关键帧。随后，LLM会综合观看视频内容、阅读转录文本，从中提取结构化知识，并创建相互关联的Wiki页面存入知识库。这些知识会随着更多视频的加入而不断融合与增强。，在技术架构上，系统包含清晰的处理流程：首先通过YouTubeExtractor获取视频元数据和转录稿，SceneFrameExtractor进行场景检测与帧提取，VisionDescriber利用LLM视觉模型描述画面内容。随后，WikiExtractor调用LLM从多模态信息中提取知识，由WikiEngine负责合并更新至知识库。知识以JSON页面形式存储在磁盘（FileWikiRepository）中，并通过SQLite的FTS5模块建立全文搜索索引。，查询时，系统不再进行原始的向量块搜索，而是通过FTS5检索已编译的知识页面，并由智能体（Agent）基于这些结构化的、互相关联的知识进行推理来生成答案。这实现了从“视频搜索引擎”到“视频知识引擎”的演进，使得系统能够基于不断积累的、跨视频的复合知识来回答问题，效率更高，答案也更富洞察力。项目提供了CLI和MCP Server两种使用方式。

title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills - A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

Dismiss alert forrestchang / andrej-karpathy-skills Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 2.5k Star 29.9k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 22 Commits 22 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin skills/ karpathy-guidelines skills/ karpathy-guidelines CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md EXAMPLES.md EXAMPLES.md README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation Karpathy-Inspired Claude Code Guidelines Looking for a managed agents platform? Check out Multica — an open-source platform for running and managing coding agents with reusable skills. A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. The Problems From Andrej's post: "The models make wrong assumptions on your behalf and just run along with them without checking. They don't manage their confusion, don't seek clarifications, don't surface inconsistencies, don't present tradeoffs, don't push back when they should." "They really like to overcomplicate code and APIs, bloat abstractions, don't clean up dead code... implement a bloated construction over 1000 lines when 100 would do." "They still sometimes change/remove comments and code they don't sufficiently understand as side effects, even if orthogonal to the task." The Solution Four principles in one file that directly address these issues: Principle Addresses Think Before Coding Wrong assumptions, hidden confusion, missing tradeoffs Simplicity First Overcomplication, bloated abstractions Surgical Changes Orthogonal edits, touching code you shouldn't Goal-Driven Execution Leverage through tests-first, verifiable success criteria The Four Principles in Detail 1. Think Before Coding Don't assume. Don't hide confusion. Surface tradeoffs. LLMs often pick an interpretation silently and run with it. This principle forces explicit reasoning: State assumptions explicitly — If uncertain, ask rather than guess Present multiple interpretations — Don't pick silently when ambiguity exists Push back when warranted — If a simpler approach exists, say so Stop when confused — Name what's unclear and ask for clarification 2. Simplicity First Minimum code that solves the problem. Nothing speculative. Combat the tendency toward overengineering: No features beyond what was asked No abstractions for single-use code No "flexibility" or "configurability" that wasn't requested No error handling for impossible scenarios If 200 lines coul
title_zh: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills - 一个单独的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude代码行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。
summary_zh: GitHub用户forrestchang创建了一个名为"andrej-karpathy-skills"的项目，其核心是一个单独的CLAUDE.md文件，旨在改进Claude Code（Claude的代码生成功能）的行为。该项目灵感来源于AI研究员Andrej Karpathy对大型语言模型（LLM）在编码中常见缺陷的观察。，Karpathy指出LLM在编码时存在几个关键问题：模型会基于错误假设自行其是而不加验证；不善于管理困惑、寻求澄清、揭示矛盾或呈现权衡方案；在应该提出异议时保持沉默。此外，它们倾向于过度复杂化代码和API，引入臃肿的抽象层，不清理无用代码，甚至可能在不完全理解的情况下错误地修改或删除与任务无关的注释和代码。，该项目提出的解决方案浓缩为包含四大原则的CLAUDE.md文件，直接针对上述问题：，1. 先思考，后编码：旨在解决错误假设和隐藏的困惑。要求模型明确陈述假设，在不确定时主动提问而非猜测；呈现多种可能的解释，避免在存在歧义时 silently 做出选择；当存在更简单方案时提出异议；遇到困惑时明确指出不清楚之处并寻求澄清。，2. 简洁至上：对抗过度工程化的倾向。强调只编写解决当前问题所需的最少代码，不添加未要求的功能、不为单次使用的代码创建抽象、不引入未请求的“灵活性”或“可配置性”、不为不可能发生的场景添加错误处理。核心是用最少的代码解决问题，避免任何推测性设计。，3. 精准修改：防止对不相关代码进行不必要的编辑。要求更改必须严格限定在任务指定的范围内，避免产生副作用。在修改代码时，需充分理解上下文，确保不破坏现有功能，并保持代码风格一致。，4. 目标驱动执行：通过测试优先和可验证的成功标准来确保效果。鼓励在开始编写实现代码之前先定义测试或验证方法，以确保工作朝着明确、可检验的目标推进，从而更有效地利用LLM的能力。，该项目将这些原则集成到一个配置文件中，供用户在Claude Code等场景中使用，以引导AI生成更可靠、更简洁、更专注的代码，减少LLM的典型编码陷阱。项目链接提供了CLAUDE.md文件以及示例（EXAMPLES.md）供参考。

Quick Start • How It Works • Search Tools • Documentation • Configuration • Troubleshooting • License Claude-Mem seamlessly preserves context across sessions by automatically capturing tool usage observations, generating semantic summaries, and making them available to future sessions. This enables Claude to maintain continuity of knowledge about projects even after sessions end or reconnect. Quick Start Install with a single command: npx claude-mem install Or install for Gemini CLI (auto-detects ~/.gemini ): npx claude-mem install --ide gemini-cli Or install from the plugin marketplace inside Claude Code: /plugin marketplace add thedotmack/claude-mem /plugin install claude-mem Restart Claude Code or Gemini CLI. Context from previous sessions will automatically appear in new sessions. Note: Claude-Mem is also published on npm, but npm install -g claude-mem installs the SDK/library only — it does not register the plugi
title_zh: Claude代码插件claude-mem：自动记录编程会话中Claude的所有操作，通过AI（使用Claude的agent-sdk）压缩信息，并将相关上下文注入未来会话。
summary_zh: 项目名称：thedotmack/claude-mem，核心功能：这是一个为Claude Code设计的插件，旨在构建一个持久化记忆压缩系统。它能够自动捕获用户在编码会话中与Claude交互的所有操作和工具使用观察，利用AI（通过Claude的agent-sdk）对这些信息进行压缩和语义总结，并将相关的上下文智能地注入到未来的会话中。，主要特点与价值：，1. 跨会话上下文保持：该插件解决了AI编码助手在会话结束后上下文丢失的痛点。它通过自动记录、总结和存储会话内容，使得Claude在后续的新会话或重连会话中，能够“记住”之前关于项目的讨论、决策和代码修改，从而保持知识的连续性。，2. 自动化工作流：整个过程无需用户手动干预。插件在后台自动运行，捕获数据、生成摘要，并在需要时提供相关历史上下文。，3. 易于集成与安装：用户可以通过多种便捷方式安装，包括使用单行命令（npx claude-mem install）、在Claude Code的插件市场中搜索添加，或为Gemini CLI安装。安装后重启IDE即可生效，历史会话的上下文会自动出现在新会话中。，4. 技术实现：项目基于Claude的agent-sdk构建，实现了对会话内容的智能压缩（而不仅仅是简单存储），这有助于高效管理和检索大量历史信息。，项目状态：该项目在GitHub上开源，获得了极高的关注度（Star数超过5.4万），拥有活跃的社区和多语言文档支持。需要注意的是，通过npm全局安装（npm install -g claude-mem）仅会安装其SDK/库，并不会自动注册插件功能，正确的插件安装应参照其提供的快速入门指南。

title_zh: NousResearch/hermes-agent - 与你共同成长的智能体
summary_zh: NousResearch在GitHub上开源了Hermes Agent项目，这是一个具备自我进化能力的AI智能体。其核心特点是内置了独特的学习循环机制，能够从交互经验中自主创建技能，并在使用过程中持续优化这些技能。系统会主动推动自身持久化知识，支持检索过往对话历史，并能在多次会话中逐步构建并深化对用户的理解模型。，该项目设计注重实用性与可扩展性，支持在多种基础设施上部署，包括成本低廉的VPS（如每月5美元级别）、GPU集群或按需计费的Serverless架构，在闲置状态下成本极低。它不依赖于特定的本地硬件环境。，技术架构上，Hermes Agent包含了技能（skills）与插件（plugins）系统、多种环境适配器、以及用于模型工具集成和轨迹压缩的模块。项目提供了完整的命令行界面（CLI）、Docker支持、详尽的文档以及测试套件，便于开发者上手和集成。，通过其持续学习和适应能力，Hermes Agent旨在成为一个能够伴随用户需求共同成长、不断自我完善的AI助手。

Prerequisites To make the most of the examples in this cookbook, you'll need a Claude API key (sign up for free here ). While the code examples are primarily written in Python, the concepts can be adapted to any programming language that supports interaction with the Claude API. If you're new to working with the Claude API, we recommend starting with our Claude API Fundamentals course to get a solid foundation. Explore Further Looking for more resources to enhance your experience with Claude and AI assistants? Check out these helpful links: Anthropic developer documentation Anthropic support docs Anthropic Discord community Contributing The Claude Cookbooks thrives on the contributions of the developer community. We value your input, whether it's submitting an idea, fixing a typo, adding a new guide, or improving an existing one. By contributing, you help make this resource even more valuable for everyone. To avoid duplication of efforts, please review the existing issues and pull requests before contributing. If you have ideas for new examples or guides, share them on the issues page . Table of recipes Capabilities Classification : Explore techniques for text and data classification using Claude.
title_zh: Anthropic/Claude 使用手册集 - 一套展示 Claude 有趣且高效使用方法的笔记本/配方合集。
summary_zh: Anthropic在GitHub上开源了“Claude Cookbooks”项目，这是一个包含大量代码示例和指南的集合，旨在帮助开发者更高效、更有创意地使用Claude AI模型进行构建。该项目提供了可直接复制并集成到自身项目中的代码片段。，项目涵盖了广泛的应用场景与技术主题，主要目录包括：核心能力（Capabilities）、智能体开发（claude_agent_sdk, agents）、编程辅助（coding）、扩展思维（extended_thinking）、微调（finetuning）、多模态处理（multimodal, images）、工具使用（tool_use）、技能开发（skills）以及可观测性（observability）等。其中，“配方”示例涉及文本与数据分类、智能体模式、第三方工具评估等多种实用技术。，使用这些示例的主要前提是拥有一个Claude API密钥。虽然代码示例主要使用Python编写，但其概念可适配至任何支持与Claude API交互的编程语言。对于API新手，项目推荐先学习Claude API基础知识课程。，该项目鼓励开发者社区贡献，无论是提交新想法、修复错误、添加新指南还是改进现有内容，共同使该资源对所有人更有价值。为避免重复工作，建议贡献前先查阅现有的议题和拉取请求。，此外，项目还提供了指向Anthropic官方开发者文档、支持文档及Discord社区等资源的链接，供开发者进一步探索和增强使用Claude及AI助手的体验。

title_zh: shanraisshan/claude-code最佳实践 - 从氛围编程到智能体工程 - 熟能生巧让Claude更完美
summary_zh: GitHub项目“claude-code-best-practice”旨在系统化地提升开发者使用Claude进行编程的效率与实践，倡导从随性的“氛围编码”转向结构化、自动化的“智能体工程”。该项目提供了全面的框架和最佳实践，帮助用户充分发挥Claude等大型语言模型在软件开发中的潜力。，项目的核心架构围绕几个关键概念构建：智能体、命令和技能。智能体是拥有独立上下文、自定义工具、权限和持久身份的自主体，位于`.claude/agents/`目录下。命令是注入到现有上下文中的知识，作为用户可调用的简单提示模板，用于编排工作流。技能则是可配置、可预加载、可自动发现的模块化知识，支持上下文分叉和渐进式信息展示，便于复杂任务的分解与执行。，项目还集成了模型上下文协议，用于连接外部工具、数据库和API，并支持通过插件市场分发功能包。其分层配置系统允许精细控制权限、模型设置、输出风格和沙箱环境。一个实用的特性是自动检查点功能，它基于Git跟踪文件更改，允许用户通过快捷键回退或进行针对性总结，增强了开发过程的可控性。，此外，项目包含CLI工具、自定义状态栏、以及通过`CLAUDE.md`文件实现的持久化记忆系统，确保项目上下文和规则能在会话间保留。总体而言，该项目通过提供一套模块化、可扩展的工程化实践，将Claude从一个对话式编码助手，转变为能够参与复杂、多步骤软件开发流程的协作智能体系统。

title: When AI Trading Works, You Won't Hear About It
title_zh: 当AI交易成功时，你根本不会听说
summary_zh: 当AI交易真正有效时，你往往不会听到相关消息。这并非因为缺乏进展，而是因为成功的AI交易系统通常作为专有工具运行在幕后，其创造者没有动机公开其核心优势。近期，一些公司开始公开讨论其AI在交易中的应用，但这更多是出于招聘和品牌宣传目的，而非分享真正的“秘方”。，当前，AI在交易领域的应用主要围绕大型语言模型展开，但其作用并非直接预测市场。LLM无法可靠预测股价，因为市场信息瞬息万变且已充分反映在价格中。相反，它们的价值体现在其他环节：一是信息处理与摘要，快速解析企业财报、新闻、分析师报告和社交媒体数据，提取关键洞察，节省分析师时间；二是代码生成与策略回测，将交易思路快速转化为可回测的代码，加速策略开发周期；三是模拟与培训，创建逼真的市场模拟环境，用于训练新交易员或测试策略在极端情景下的表现。，一些对冲基金和交易公司已开始实践。例如，Man Group利用LLM进行新闻情绪分析；Renaissance Technologies虽未公开细节，但长期以复杂数学模型和计算能力著称；Jump Trading则用AI分析另类数据。然而，这些应用大多是对现有量化方法的增强，而非革命性替代。真正的自动化“AI交易员”尚未出现，部分原因是LLM在数学和逻辑推理方面仍有局限，且金融市场具有对抗性，一旦某种模式有效，很快就会因被广泛使用而失效。，技术挑战依然存在。首先，数据质量与实时性至关重要，过时或嘈杂的数据会导致错误决策。其次，过度拟合风险很高，模型可能在历史数据上表现良好，却无法适应未来市场变化。再者，解释性是一大难题，复杂的“黑箱”模型难以让风险经理和监管机构信服。此外，系统集成与低延迟要求极高，交易系统需要与市场数据源、执行系统无缝对接，并在毫秒级做出反应。，尽管面临挑战，AI与交易的结合仍在稳步推进。未来的发展可能集中在几个方向：利用多模态AI分析财报电话会议的音视频数据；开发更擅长逻辑和数学推理的专用模型；以及探索AI在风险管理、资产配置等更广泛领域的应用。然而，最成功的应用很可能依旧保持低调，因为在这个赢家通吃的领域，保持信息优势才是长期盈利的关键。

title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund - An AI Hedge Fund Team
content: GitHub - virattt/ai-hedge-fund: An AI Hedge Fund Team · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert virattt / ai-hedge-fund Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 9.3k Star 53.7k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 817 Commits 817 Commits .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE app app docker docker src src tests tests .dockerignore .dockerignore .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore README.md README.md poetry.lock poetry.lock pyproject.toml pyproject.toml View all files Repository files navigation AI Hedge Fund This is a proof of concept for an AI-powered hedge fund. The goal of this project is to explore the use of AI to make trading decisions. This project is for educational purposes only and is not intended for real trading or investment. This system employs several agents working together: Aswath Damodaran Agent - The Dean of Valuation, focuses on story, numbers, and disciplined valuation Ben Graham Agent - The godfather of value investing, only buys hidden gems with a margin of safety Bill Ackman Agent - An activist investor, takes bold positions and pushes for change Cathie Wood Agent - The queen of growth investing, believes in the power of innovation and disruption Charlie Munger Agent - Warren Buffett's partner, only buys wonderful businesses at fair prices Michael Burry Agent - The Big Short contrarian who hunts for deep value Mohnish Pabrai Agent - The Dhandho investor, who looks for doubles at low risk Nassim Taleb Agent - The Black Swan risk analyst, focuses on tail risk, antifragility, and asymmetric payoffs Peter Lynch Agent - Practical investor who seeks "ten-baggers" in everyday businesses Phil Fisher Agent - Meticulous growth investor who uses deep "scuttlebutt" research Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent - The Big Bull of India Stanley Druckenmiller Agent - Macro legend who hunts for asymmetric opportunities with growth potential Warren Buffett Agent - The oracle of Omaha, seeks wonderful companies at a fair price Valuation Agent - Calculates the intrinsic value of a stock and generates trading signals Sentiment Agent - Analyzes market sentiment and generates trading signals Fundamentals Agent - Analyzes fundamental data and generates trading signals Technicals Agent - Analyzes technical indicators and generates trading signals Risk Manager - Calculates risk metrics and sets position limits Portfolio Manager - Makes final trading decisions and generates orders Note: the system does not actually make any trades. Disclaimer This project is for educational and research purposes only . Not intended for real trading or investment No investment advice or guaran
title_zh: Virattt/人工智能对冲基金 - 一支人工智能对冲基金团队
summary_zh: GitHub项目“virattt/ai-hedge-fund”是一个概念验证性质的AI驱动对冲基金系统。该项目旨在探索利用人工智能进行交易决策，但仅用于教育研究目的，不涉及真实交易或投资。，该系统的核心是一个多智能体协作框架，模拟了多位著名投资大师的风格与职能。这些AI智能体包括：专注于故事、数据和纪律性估值的“估值院长”Aswath Damodaran Agent；价值投资之父本杰明·格雷厄姆风格的Agent，只寻找具有安全边际的隐藏瑰宝；采取大胆立场并推动变革的激进投资者比尔·阿克曼Agent；坚信创新与颠覆力量的成长股投资代表凯茜·伍德Agent；以及沃伦·巴菲特的搭档查理·芒格Agent，致力于以合理价格收购出色的企业。，此外，系统还包含其他特色Agent，例如《大空头》原型迈克尔·伯里风格的逆向价值猎手、寻求低风险高回报的莫尼什·帕伯莱Agent、专注于尾部风险和不对称回报的纳西姆·塔勒布风险分析师Agent，以及寻找“十倍股”的彼得·林奇风格Agent等。，除了模拟具体投资人物，系统还设有多个功能型Agent来处理不同维度的分析：Valuation Agent负责计算股票内在价值并生成交易信号；Sentiment Agent分析市场情绪；Fundamentals Agent分析基本面数据；Technicals Agent分析技术指标。所有分析最终由Risk Manager计算风险指标并设置头寸限制，Portfolio Manager则做出最终交易决策并生成订单。，该项目通过整合多种投资哲学和量化分析维度，构建了一个复杂的模拟决策环境。其技术价值在于展示了如何将不同的AI模型（或逻辑）模块化，并协调工作以模拟完整的投资流程。需要再次强调的是，该系统仅为教育演示，不执行真实交易，也不提供任何投资建议。
